risks.title: Security file modified without documented review
risks.evidence: Security.tsx changed 4 times within 17 seconds with no evidence of security testing or review in event stream
risks.recommendedAction: Review Security.tsx changes immediately and run security tests before merging

risks.title: Event deduplication failure in monitoring system
risks.evidence: 4 events for identical file modification at timestamps differing by <1ms, 2 marked as duplicates but still processed
risks.recommendedAction: Implement stricter deduplication logic in code-observer to prevent alert fatigue

opportunities.title: Establish automated security testing for critical files
opportunities.evidence: Security.tsx modifications detected but no automated security test evidence in event stream
opportunities.suggestedAction: Add security tests to CI/CD pipeline triggered on Security.tsx changes

opportunities.title: Improve event deduplication accuracy
opportunities.evidence: Duplicate events with relevance scores 0.3 and 0.2 still being generated despite deduplication tags
opportunities.suggestedAction: Implement timestamp-based deduplication window (e.g., 5ms threshold) in code-observer

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx changes and assess impact
taskCandidates.description: Review the 4 modifications to src/screens/Security.tsx and document what changed and why
taskCandidates.rationale: Security-related file modifications require immediate attention and documentation

taskCandidates.title: Run security tests for Security.tsx
taskCandidates.description: Execute security tests targeting the Security module to ensure no vulnerabilities introduced
taskCandidates.rationale: Changes to security module must be validated before merge

taskCandidates.title: Fix event deduplication in code-observer
taskCandidates.description: Implement stricter deduplication based on file path + timestamp window to eliminate redundant events
taskCandidates.rationale: Duplicate events reduce signal quality and may hide critical issues

recommendations.title: Prioritize security file review
recommendations.rationale: High-relevance events (0.85-0.95) on security module indicate critical changes requiring immediate attention
recommendations.action: Assign security-trained reviewer to audit Security.tsx diff immediately

recommendations.title: Deduplicate monitoring events
recommendations.rationale: 50% of Security.tsx events are marked duplicate, indicating monitoring system needs refinement
recommendations.action: Update code-observer to use 5-10ms time window for deduplication and implement duplicate suppression
